data.name: Laura Lustful Secrets
data.detailed_description:
Laura Lustful Secrets is a game about corruption, cheating and power.

You play as Laura, a housewife bored with the routine of her marriage to Samuel, an accountant who works for an almost bankrupt company. Laura tries at all costs to warm up her marriage. But after the arrival of a charming visitor at her home, she is forced to make decisions that will change the course of her life forever!

Gameplay:

  • A game that mixes eroticism with a bit of comedy.

  • Multiple-choices game: Your actions and choices will affect the course of your story.

  • Interact with a large number of beautiful characters and unique characteristics.

Visual

  • Stunning images.

  • Spicy poses.

  • Amazing animations.

Sandbox

  • You are free to walk around the city.

  • Interactive map with a variety of places to visit.

  • Lots of secret items and special scenes to collect.

Join the adventure. Laura is waiting for you!

data.short_description: Laura lives a boring life in a quiet neighborhood, but her life is changed when an unwelcome visitor enters her home. It all gets worse when a series of crimes take over the entire city and Laura, an ordinary housewife, has to show her claws and try to restore order and save the city.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 處理器: 64 bit Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9, OpenGL ES 2 or WebGL
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
